quickView.closeHint: Press Space or Esc to close. Left/Right: previous or next file.

quickView.readOnlyEncoding: This file does not use a supported encoding for safe editing and saving.

home.dropZoneClickToBrowse: Click to browse for images or videos
home.dropZoneOrDropFiles: Or drag and drop files here

dashboard.subtitle: Quick access to your favorite, tagged, and frequently used items
dashboard.emptyFavoritesDescription: Right-click on any file or folder in the navigator and select "Add to favorites" to see them here.
dashboard.emptyTaggedDescription: Use tags to organize and categorize your files and folders for quick access.
dashboard.emptyFrequentDescription: Items you open frequently will appear here automatically.
dashboard.emptyHistoryDescription: Your recently opened files and folders will appear here.
dashboard.minutesAgo: {n} min ago | {n} min ago | {n} min ago | {n} min ago
dashboard.hoursAgo: {n} hour ago | {n} hours ago | {n} hours ago | {n} hours ago
dashboard.daysAgo: {n} day ago | {n} days ago | {n} days ago | {n} days ago
dashboard.openedCount: Opened {n} time | Opened {n} times | Opened {n} times | Opened {n} times

visualEffects.title: Visual effects
visualEffects.useTheSameSettingsForAllPages: Use the same settings for all pages
visualEffects.pauseBackgroundVideoWhenIdle: Pause background video when the app is idle or minimized
visualEffects.pauseBannerVideoWhenIdle: Pause banner video when the app is idle or minimized

dateTime.showRelativeDates: Display time in relative format for recent times (e.g. 5 min ago, Today at 3:15 PM)

uiElements.preventDropdownCloseFocusReturn: Prevent focus return when closing dropdowns
uiElements.preventDropdownCloseFocusReturnDescripti: When enabled, closing a dropdown (e.g. with Escape) will not return focus to the trigger button, avoiding focus ring and tooltip display
uiElements.quickAccessOnHover: Open quick access panel on hover
uiElements.quickAccessOnHoverDescription: When enabled, the quick access panel opens automatically when hovering over the dashboard button in the sidebar

infoPanel.title: Info panel
infoPanel.dynamicSizeTooltip: Manually resizing the info panel turns this off and saves your custom sizes.
infoPanel.showFullSizeImagePreview: Show full-size image in info panel preview
infoPanel.showFullSizeImagePreviewDescription: Alternatively, you can select an image and press {shortcut} to view the full-size image in Quick view.
infoPanel.muteVideoPreviewByDefaultDescription: Automatically mutes videos in the info panel preview to prevent unexpected audio while browsing.
infoPanel.autoplayVideoPreviewDescription: Starts playback in the info panel preview when you select a video file.

addressBar.dialogAccessibleDescription: Type a path or search by name. Pick from the list or press Enter to open.
addressBar.enterValidPath: Enter valid path to a file / directory.
addressBar.clipboardDoesntHaveValidPath: Clipboard doesn't have a valid path

tabAppearance.title: Tab appearance
tabAppearance.description: Customize how navigator tabs are displayed.

globalSearch.title: Global search
globalSearch.parallelScanningDescription: Scan multiple drives simultaneously. Faster but uses more CPU and disk resources.
globalSearch.autoReindexWhenIdleDescription: Automatically reindex drives when the app is idle and the index is older than the specified period.
globalSearch.resultLimitDescription: Maximum number of best-matching results to display.
globalSearch.searchIndexingDescription: Indexing lets the app find your files and directories quickly.
globalSearch.higherDepthScansWillIncrease: Higher depth scans will increase both the scan and the search time, but will allow you to find files located in more deeply nested directories.
globalSearch.enterPathToAddToIgnored: Enter a path to add to the ignored list and press
globalSearch.ignoredPathsHelpThumbsDb: Skips a file or folder name anywhere.
globalSearch.ignoredPathsHelpTestFolder: Skips folders named test and their contents anywhere.
globalSearch.ignoredPathsHelpExtensionMask: Skips files with the .log extension anywhere.
globalSearch.ignoredPathsHelpNestedExtensionMask: Skips files with the .tmp extension in any folder.

drives.focusAppWhenDriveConnected: Focus the app when a drive is connected
drives.autoplaySettingsDescription: Configure whether Windows Explorer opens automatically when a drive is connected

stats.title: User data
stats.description: The app stores data locally (tags, favorites, history, recently opened items) to enable features like dashboard lists and search. This data is stored in the app directory.

defaultFileManager.title: Set Sigma File Manager as the default file manager
defaultFileManager.description: This option modifies the system registry and can have unexpected side effects on your device. Continue at your own risk.

shortcutsUI.globalShortcutsTriggerActionsWhenNotFocu: Global shortcuts will trigger actions even when the app is not focused.
shortcutsUI.globalShortcutRegisterFailed: This global shortcut could not be registered. It may already be used by Windows or another app. Try a different combination (for example Win+Shift+… or Ctrl+Alt+…).
shortcutsUI.shortcutRecorderGlobalCaptureHint: If keys do not appear when you press them, your system or another program may be handling them before this window receives them. Try another combination.

shortcuts.transferPreparedForCopying: Transfer prepared for copying / moving items here

shortcuts.transferPreparedToPane2: Transfer prepared for copying / moving items to pane 2

shortcutEditorDialog.pressDesiredKeyCombination: Press desired key combination and then press ENTER

deleteIrreversibly.title: Deleting from drive
deleteIrreversibly.description: This operation will permanently delete {count} items from your computer.
deleteIrreversibly.confirm: Confirm, if you understand this cannot be undone.

notifications.conflictCheckFailed: Could not verify file conflicts. Paste aborted for safety.

notifications.movedNItems: Moved 0 items | Moved 1 item | Moved {n} items | Moved {n} items

name: Name
mountableDevicesDescription: Discovered devices that can be mounted

conflictDialog.title: File conflict
conflictDialog.description: 0 items with the same name already exist in the destination | 1 item with the same name already exists in the destination | {n} items with the same name already exist in the destination | {n} items with the same name already exist in the destination
conflictDialog.typeMismatch: Folder and file differ at this path
conflictDialog.replaceOverview: {replaced} of {total} items will be replaced at the destination
conflictDialog.skipIdenticalFiles: Skip {n} file with the same size and date | Skip {n} files with the same size and date

topLevelConflictDialog.title: Items already exist
topLevelConflictDialog.description: 0 items with these names already exist in this directory. | 1 item with this name already exists in this directory. | {n} items with these names already exist in this directory. | {n} items with these names already exist in this directory.
topLevelConflictDialog.hint: Choose Rename to create renamed items, or Merge to review conflicts inside the existing items.

quickSearchPropertyTooltip.name: Search only in the name and extension (not the folder path).
quickSearchPropertyTooltip.size: Filter by size. Use comparisons (>=, <=, >, <, =, ==) with a number and optional unit (b, kb, mb, gb, tb). Without a unit, megabytes are used. Examples: size: >=2mb, size: >=2. Ranges: size: 1mb..10mb.
quickSearchPropertyTooltip.items: Filter by folder item count. Use comparisons (>=, <=, >, <, =, ==) with whole numbers. Examples: items: >=5. Ranges: items: 3..10. Files are excluded.
quickSearchPropertyTooltip.modified: Search in the displayed modified date text.
quickSearchPropertyTooltip.created: Search in the displayed created date text.
quickSearchPropertyTooltip.accessed: Search in the displayed accessed date text.
quickSearchPropertyTooltip.path: Search only in the full path.
quickSearchPropertyTooltip.mime: Search in the MIME type text.

fileBrowser.name: Name
fileBrowser.directoryIsEmptyDescription: There are no files or folders in this directory
fileBrowser.cannotMoveToSameDirectory: Cannot move items to the same directory
fileBrowser.cannotPasteIntoItself: Cannot paste a folder into itself
fileBrowser.cannotCreateLinkInsideItself: Cannot create a folder link inside itself

sizeTooltip.title: Directory Size Legend
sizeTooltip.notCalculated: Size not calculated, or auto-calculation was canceled due to time limit
sizeTooltip.note: Select a folder and click "Get size" in the info panel for full size calculation.

errors.destinationInsideSelectedFolder: Destination archive is inside a selected folder

fileBrowser.linkMetadataPerformanceWarning: May increase memory usage and reduce performance.

openWith.noProgramsFound: No associated programs found for this file type
openWith.enterProgramPath: Choose another app or enter path...
openWith.argumentsHint: Additional command-line arguments. Use %1 as placeholder for the file path.
openWith.noCustomCommands: No custom commands yet. Add a custom command to open files with specific flags.

changelog.title: What's New
changelog.settingsDescription: View release notes and configure update notifications

extensions.subtitle: Browse and manage extensions from the community
extensions.installLocalError: Failed to install extension from folder
extensions.removedBecauseUnapproved: This extension was removed because it is no longer in the approved registry.
extensions.noResultsDescription: No extensions match "{query}". Try a different search term.
extensions.noExtensionsAvailable: No extensions available in the registry
extensions.marketplaceUnavailableDescription: Could not connect to the extension registry. Check your internet connection and try again.
extensions.githubConnectivityIssueDescription: Some extension version checks failed because the app could not connect to GitHub. Check your internet connection, VPN, or firewall settings and try again later.
extensions.offlineIssueDescription: Extension installs, updates, and version checks require an internet connection. Reconnect to the network to use marketplace features.
extensions.noInstalledExtensionsDescription: Browse the marketplace to discover extensions that enhance your file manager experience.
extensions.noPermissions: This extension does not require any special permissions.
extensions.noExtensionCommands: This extension does not provide any commands.
extensions.platformIncompatible: This extension is not compatible with your platform ({current}). It only supports: {supported}
extensions.readmeNotFound: README file not found for this extension.
extensions.changelogNotFound: Changelog not found for this extension.

dependencies.noDependenciesDescription: Shared binaries will appear here when extensions install dependencies like FFmpeg or Deno.
dependencies.removeWarning: This dependency is still used by extensions
dependencies.removeConfirm: This dependency is used by: {extensions}. They will need to re-download it on next use. Remove anyway?

badges.officialTooltip: This extension is created and maintained by the Sigma File Manager team
badges.communityTooltip: This is a community extension. Review the source code before installing.
badges.localTooltip: This extension was installed from a local folder
badges.brokenTooltip: Extension files are missing. Uninstall to remove from the list.

settings.title: Extension Settings
settings.noExtensionsDescription: Install and enable extensions that have configurable settings to see them here.

api.permissionDeniedBinary: Permission denied: shell (required for binary management)
api.waitForDependencies: Wait until the extension finishes downloading its dependencies

commandPalette.accessibleDialogDescription: Type to filter commands, then choose one from the list.
commandPalette.noCommands: No commands registered. Install and enable extensions to add commands.

lanShare.notWorkingReasonVpn: Do not use a VPN while sharing.
lanShare.notWorkingReasonFirewall: If you previously blocked this app in the firewall, allow network access so other devices on your LAN can connect.
lanShare.idleHint: You can let devices on your local network access your files and folders.
lanShare.replaceShareDialogDescription: Files are already being shared over the network. The current share will be stopped and replaced with the new one.
